questions.text: During respiration, glucose is broken down to release:
questions.explanation: During cellular respiration, glucose is broken down in the presence of oxygen to release energy (ATP).
Fish have gills that extract dissolved oxygen from water for respiration.

questions.text: What is the difference between breathing and respiration?
questions.correctAnswer: Breathing is physical process of inhaling/exhaling. Respiration is chemical process of breaking down food.
questions.explanation: Breathing involves inhaling oxygen and exhaling CO₂. Respiration occurs at cellular level to release energy.

questions.text: The tiny pores in leaves for gas exchange are called ________.
questions.explanation: Stomata are tiny pores on leaf surface that allow gas exchange (CO₂ in, O₂ out) during photosynthesis and respiration.
